zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：高位震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前SOL/美元维持高位震荡结构，价格运行在78附近，略高于20日均线77.62，短线多头占优但动能有限，呈现整理上行格局，短期偏多。  

MACD指标位于0轴上方至0.76水平，显示多头动能仍在延续，但缺少RSI参考下需警惕超买风险与短线背离可能，信号偏强但需确认，等待放量确认。  

短线支撑集中在77.60-77.85区间，20日均线构成动态支撑；上方78.20形成即时阻力，若突破或上看78.50区域，需量能配合。  

操作上建议以区间交易为主，回踩77.60附近分批做多，跌破77.50止损；反弹至78.50上方可逐步止盈，避免追高，控制风险严格执行，稳健为先。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
vs USD is currently trading around 78.1, reflecting a very tight intraday range between 77.85 and 78.18. Price action suggests a consolidation phase after a minor upward drift of 0.28% over 24 hours. The market is coiling near short-term equilibrium, with volatility compressed. Despite the lack of strong directional breakout, structure remains slightly constructive as price holds above key short-term averages.

Momentum indicators show a mild bullish bias. MACD reading at 0.7623 indicates positive momentum, even though the signal line is not provided, suggesting histogram strength remains above zero. This implies buyers are still marginally in control. RSI data is unavailable, but price behavior near the upper edge of the recent range suggests neutral-to-slightly-overbought conditions without exhaustion. Short-term momentum remains dependent on a breakout confirmation above resistance.

Immediate support is found near the SMA(20) at 77.621, aligning closely with the lower boundary of the current consolidation range around 77.5–77.6. A deeper support zone sits near 76.8, which would likely attract dip-buying interest if tested. On the upside, resistance is forming at 78.18–78.2, with a stronger barrier near 79.5 and psychological resistance at 80. A sustained break above resistance would likely shift momentum toward continuation.

Trading conditions favor range-bound strategies while price remains compressed. Buying near support around 77.6 with tight risk control may be effective, while aggressive traders can target breakout entries above 78.2. Stops should be placed below 77.2 to manage downside risk. If upside momentum expands, partial profit-taking near 79.5 and 80 would be prudent, reflecting key technical barriers. Risk-reward remains favorable only with disciplined execution in current volatility.
